name: Oreo Truffles
recipeIngredient: 1 package of Oreos or enough to make 4 cups of Oreo cookie crumbs
1 (8 oz) package of cream cheese, softened
2 1/4 cups of good quality semi-sweet chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a food processor or blender to reduce all the Oreos to fine crumbs. Set aside.
2. Melt chocolate in a double boiler or empty chocolate chips into a large microwaveable mixing bowl and microwave on high, stirring at 45 second increments until melted (no more than two or three minutes). Watch carefully as chocolate can burn quickly.
3. Add optional flavoring and softened cream cheese to the melted chocolate. Mix thoroughly until all white streaks are gone; do not mix in a food processor as the mixture will be stiff.
4. Gradually add 3 cups of Oreo crumbs to the chocolate-cream cheese mixture. Stir until well combined and fairly smooth (can be mixed in a stand mixer).
5. Place the remaining Oreo crumbs into a shallow bowl.
6. Form the mixture into small balls (about 3/4 inch) and roll each truffle in Oreo crumbs, coconut, ground nuts, or cocoa to lightly coat.
7. Place each Oreo truffle into a paper candy cup. Store in the fridge and serve slightly chilled for best texture and taste.
